name: Workflow Engine
description: State machine workflow enforcement for OpenClaw agents. Prevents LLM drift in structured workflows by enforcing deterministic state transitions, per-state tool scoping, input validation, and persistent audit logging.

workflowsDir.description: Directory containing compiled workflow definition files (.js). TypeScript sources must be compiled first.

dbPath.description: SQLite database path for workflow state persistence.

enableDashboard.description: Enable the HTTP dashboard for workflow visualization and audit log inspection.

dashboardPort.description: TCP port for the workflow dashboard (only used when enableDashboard is true).
